title: Epic Fight x Iron's Spells Armor Fix
description: Fixes issues when combining Epic Fight with Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks armor.
body:
![EFxIRON'S](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16801cc6bf218980ed816e0ef513d7b536a0e0b1.png)

# ABOUT
### When wearing the armor from Iron's Spell Books while in Epic Fight's Fight mode, the armor usually looks like this:
![Before](https://i.imgur.com/0aZwU1D.png)

### When applying this pack, it'll look like this:
![After](https://i.imgur.com/91aOEPY.png)
